name: [Loaded Potato] BYOVD - Known Vulnerable Driver Loaded (Sysmon EID 6)
description: Detects Sysmon Event ID 6 (DriverLoad) for any driver in the LOL Drivers database. Attackers load signed but exploitable kernel drivers (BYOVD  -  Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver) to disable EDR/AV, escalate to ring-0 privileges, or read/write kernel memory. MITRE ATT&CK: T1068 (Exploitation for Privilege Escalation), T1543.003 (Windows Service). Sources: loldrivers.io API + LOLDrivers Sigma + SigmaHQ. Cache contains 418 drivers as of 2026-03-31. Enable rule and set schedule appropriate to your environment. Regenerate from menu option 10e after updating the LOL Drivers cache.

name: [Loaded Potato] BYOVD - Known Vulnerable Driver Loaded (Elastic Defend)
description: Detects an Elastic Defend driver-load event for any driver in the LOL Drivers database. Attackers load signed but exploitable kernel drivers (BYOVD  -  Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver) to disable EDR/AV, escalate to ring-0 privileges, or read/write kernel memory. MITRE ATT&CK: T1068 (Exploitation for Privilege Escalation), T1543.003 (Windows Service). Sources: loldrivers.io API + LOLDrivers Sigma + SigmaHQ. Cache contains 418 drivers as of 2026-03-31. Enable rule and set schedule appropriate to your environment. Regenerate from menu option 10e after updating the LOL Drivers cache.

name: [Loaded Potato] BYOVD - Critical EDR Killer Driver Loaded
description: Detects the highest-risk BYOVD kernel drivers individually confirmed in active ransomware and nation-state APT campaigns specifically to kill EDR/AV and escalate kernel privileges. Any match is high-confidence malicious with no expected legitimate use in a production environment. Covered drivers: aswarpot.sys, aswvmm.sys, bedaisy.sys, blackbone.sys, blackbonedrv10.sys, capcom.sys, dbutil.sys, dbutil_2_3.sys, dbutildrv2.sys, gdrv.sys, iqvw64.sys, iqvw64e.sys, kprocesshacker.sys, mhyprot.sys, mhyprot2.sys, mhyprot3.sys, mhyprotect.sys, mhyprotnap.sys, procexp.sys, procexp152.sys, rtcore64.sys, truesight.sys, zam64.sys, zamguard64.sys. Campaigns: BlackByte (RTCore64), SCATTERED SPIDER (RTCore64), Genshin ransomware (mhyprot variants), Terminator/BURNTCIGAR (zamguard64/zam64), RobbinHood (gdrv), AvosLocker/POORTRY (aswArPot), Lazarus Group (bedaisy, kprocesshacker). MITRE ATT&CK: T1068, T1543.003, T1562.001.
query: (winlog.event_id: 6 AND winlog.event_data.ImageLoaded: (*\\aswarpot.sys OR *\\aswvmm.sys OR *\\bedaisy.sys OR *\\blackbone.sys OR *\\blackbonedrv10.sys OR *\\capcom.sys OR *\\dbutil.sys OR *\\dbutil_2_3.sys OR *\\dbutildrv2.sys OR *\\gdrv.sys OR *\\iqvw64.sys OR *\\iqvw64e.sys OR *\\kprocesshacker.sys OR *\\mhyprot.sys OR *\\mhyprot2.sys OR *\\mhyprot3.sys OR *\\mhyprotect.sys OR *\\mhyprotnap.sys OR *\\procexp.sys OR *\\procexp152.sys OR *\\rtcore64.sys OR *\\truesight.sys OR *\\zam64.sys OR *\\zamguard64.sys)) OR (event.category: driver AND event.type: load AND driver.path: (*\\aswarpot.sys OR *\\aswvmm.sys OR *\\bedaisy.sys OR *\\blackbone.sys OR *\\blackbonedrv10.sys OR *\\capcom.sys OR *\\dbutil.sys OR *\\dbutil_2_3.sys OR *\\dbutildrv2.sys OR *\\gdrv.sys OR *\\iqvw64.sys OR *\\iqvw64e.sys OR *\\kprocesshacker.sys OR *\\mhyprot.sys OR *\\mhyprot2.sys OR *\\mhyprot3.sys OR *\\mhyprotect.sys OR *\\mhyprotnap.sys OR *\\procexp.sys OR *\\procexp152.sys OR *\\rtcore64.sys OR *\\truesight.sys OR *\\zam64.sys OR *\\zamguard64.sys))
author: Loaded Potato
